sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Users, Building, Calendar, TrendingUp, DollarSign, AlertCircle, LogOut, Home, Settings, FileText } from 'lucide-react'; import { useAuth } from '../contexts/AuthContext'; const AdminDashboard = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const stats = [ { title: 'Total Employees', value: '124', icon: Users, color: 'bg-blue-500', change: '+12%', changeType: 'positive' }, { title: 'Active Projects', value: '18', icon: Building, color: 'bg-green-500', change: '+3', changeType: 'positive' }, { title: 'Monthly Revenue', value: '$45.2k', icon: DollarSign, color: 'bg-purple-500', change: '+8%', changeType: 'positive' }, { title: 'Pending Tasks', value: '47', icon: FileText, color: 'bg-orange-500', change: '-5', changeType: 'negative' } ]; const recentActivities = [ { id: 1, action: 'New employee registered', user: 'John Doe', time: '2 hours ago', type: 'success' }, { id: 2, action: 'Project deadline approaching', user: 'Project Alpha', time: '5 hours ago', type: 'warning' }, { id: 3, action: 'System backup completed', user: 'System', time: '1 day ago', type: 'info' }, { id: 4, action: 'New client added', user: 'Tech Corp', time: '2 days ago', type: 'success' } ]; const handleLogout = () => { logout(); }; return (
{/* Header */}
Home

Admin Dashboard

{user?.username || 'Admin'}

Administrator

{/* Main Content */}
{/* Welcome Section */}

Welcome back, {user?.username || 'Admin'}!

Here's an overview of your organization's performance.

{/* Stats Grid */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => { const Icon = stat.icon; return (
{stat.change}

{stat.title}

{stat.value}

); })}
{/* Recent Activities */}

Recent Activities

View All
{recentActivities.map((activity) => (

{activity.action}

{activity.user} • {activity.time}

))}
{/* Quick Actions & Management */}

Management

{/* Branch Locations */}

Branch Locations

View All
{['Head Office - New York', 'Branch Office - London', 'Branch Office - Tokyo'].map((branch, index) => (
{branch}
{index === 0 ? 'HQ' : `Branch ${index}`}
))}
); }; export default AdminDashboard;
